what: Approved data sharing with provincial partner using anonymised identifiers only.
why: PIA completed. No direct identifiers transmitted. Compliant with Privacy Act s.8(2)(a).

what: Project meets all requirements of the TBS Directive on Service and Digital.
why: Retention schedule defined. Data quality standards documented. Interoperability profile complete.

what: Security architecture approved. mTLS required. No data persistence on requesting system.
why: Threat model reviewed. API internal-facing only. TLS 1.3 in transit. Pen test required before go-live.
